title: Infernum Effugium
description: A minecraft mod that adds a new nether roof structure, giving access to the nether roof and a new mace.
body:
**NOTICE: If a version is not tagged with POLYMER, it does not have support for Polymer. I will not make any more versions with polymer, nor support older versions using polymer.**

# Infernum Effugium

Adds a new nether roof structure allowing for easy access to the Wither fight without grinding and brand new weapons.

## Ruined Cities

Ruined Cities are a new structure located on the nether roof that gives access to 3 wither skulls and 4 soul sand to make a wither without having to go around killing wither skeletons (although there are wither skeleton spawners, so you can do that anyways). The city has decent loot, although it's best loot; a treasure bastion loot chest; is located in the towers piece and is guarded by 2 piglin brute spawners!

![Ruined City Screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7988ee8a1ee7f3e86288baf27442cedfc6a43dbd.png)

![Cake!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8a1d946163fade0583fce1e9936a9409c0a59719.png)

![Inside the ruined city's main structure](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d5c4f28f7af5e9b6ce417e9eb323e248818decfd.png)

## Bedrock Sickles

The bedrock sickles are a new weapon, having their base form along with a netherite-infused form gained from smithing the weapon with a netherite upgrade template.
Bedrock sickles force you to have both sickles in your offhand and mainhand, trading off your utility hand for increased attack damage and insane speeds. Bedrock sickles also always deal upwards knockback.

![Bedrock Sickles in the inventory.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f06def19d5514cafd7f67ab77c5257865a0b129d.png)

![Netherite-Infused bedrock sickles in the inventory.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b04caacf221391745e42d79bf4901e1b1561936b.png)

## Infernum Mace

Working like the original mace (and working in 1.20!), hitting something with built up fall damage will deal big amounts of damage over time instead of all at once, and will shoot up an array of deadly magma pebbles depending on the fall distance (so don't use it near a wooden base!).

Infernum Maces are crafted with a nether star, stone and a blaze rod.

oh yeah, there's also pebbles. you can stone people in this mod. hell yeah

## Pebble Cannon

The pebble cannon is an item to help you throw pebbles faster and longer; requiring pebbles as ammunition. The cannon has a small chance to get jammed and comes with a stew of enchantments inspired by TF2!

### Backburner

Deals lethal amounts of Damage Over Time fire damage when getting a successful pebble hit from the back.

### Flamethrower

Turns all Blackstone Pebbles into Magma Pebbles.

### Ender

Disables gravity on pebble and speeds them up considerably, at the cost of a longer firing time.

### Shotgun

Fires 8 pebbles at once and makes the cannon immune to jamming, but makes the cannon take longer to fire. Stacks with ender!

### Airblast

Replaces the pebble firing ability of the cannon with a knock-back air-blast that can shoot both you and your opponent back. Increases air mobility when used on self! (better air strafing requires mod to be installed on the client)

## Pact Tower & Nether Pact

This mod also adds in the Pact Tower, Nether Pact and Greed Vault.

The nether pact is a irreversible origins-like effect that gives you fire resistance and fire aspect, but makes you take damage while in rain or water.

The Nether Pact will also allow you to walk on lava and give you slightly redder skin (only to players with the mod installed client-side)

You can un-do the effect of the Nether Pact with /un_nether_pact.

![Picture of the Greed Vault showing a Blaze Rod surrounded by rocky bushes.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/01d9612621c9f1d052233897a6b41731dbb0de11.png)

![The Pact Tower, completely alone and quiet in the nether roof](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3e4b253350c6e27dffd5485303c3a935bc8c5eb6_0.webp)

Mod """trailer""" [here](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=b6f1rWQMCg8)

There is a 10% chance to gain a Death Whistle when killing a cat using Sickles.
[Death Whistle Sound Effect Source](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dVbyQkn6GWg)
